executives.name: Vagner Rego
executives.background: Vagner Rego became President and CEO of Atlas Copco Group on May 1, 2024. He joined the Group in 1996 as a trainee in Brazil. He has held various leadership roles including President of the Compressor Technique business area and President of the Service division within Compressor Technique.

executives.name: Peter Kinnart
executives.background: Peter Kinnart has been the Chief Financial Officer since 2021. He joined Atlas Copco in 1993 and has held several financial and operational positions within the Group, including Vice President Business Control for the Compressor Technique business area.

executives.name: Philippe Erneryd
executives.background: Philippe Erneryd is the Business Area President for Compressor Technique. He joined the Group in 1995 and has held various management positions in Europe and Asia.

executives.name: Andrew Walker
executives.background: Andrew Walker is the Business Area President for Power Technique. He joined Atlas Copco in 1986 and has held several leadership roles in different business areas and regions.

executives.name: Henrik Elmin
executives.background: Henrik Elmin is the Business Area President for Industrial Technique. He joined the Group in 2007 and has held various positions including President of the General Industry Tools and Assembly Systems division.

executives.name: Geert Follens
executives.background: Geert Follens is the Business Area President for Vacuum Technique. He joined Atlas Copco in 1995 and has held several management positions within the Compressor Technique and Vacuum Technique business areas.

executives.name: Cecilia Sandberg
executives.background: Cecilia Sandberg is the Senior Vice President, Chief Human Resources Officer. She joined Atlas Copco in 2015 and has extensive experience in HR from various international companies.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Chief Human Resources Officer

executives.name: Eva Klasén
executives.background: Eva Klasén is the Senior Vice President, Chief Legal Officer. She joined Atlas Copco in 2000 and has held several positions within the legal department.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Chief Legal Officer

board_of_directors.name: Hans Stråberg
board_of_directors.background: Hans Stråberg is the Chair of the Board. He has extensive experience from leading positions in international industrial companies, including President and CEO of Electrolux.

board_of_directors.name: Mats Rahmström
board_of_directors.background: Mats Rahmström was the President and CEO of Atlas Copco Group until April 30, 2024. He remains on the board as a director.

board_of_directors.name: Staffan Bohman
board_of_directors.background: Staffan Bohman is a Director with extensive experience in industrial management and board work in several listed companies.

board_of_directors.name: Anna Ohlsson-Leijon
board_of_directors.background: Anna Ohlsson-Leijon is a Director and currently CEO of Electrolux Europe. She has a strong background in finance and management.

board_of_directors.name: Heléne Mellquist
board_of_directors.background: Heléne Mellquist is a Director and has held several senior positions within the Volvo Group.

board_of_directors.name: Johan Forssell
board_of_directors.background: Johan Forssell is a Director and the President and CEO of Investor AB.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Wallenberg Jr
board_of_directors.background: Peter Wallenberg Jr is a Director and Chair of the Knut and Alice Wallenberg Foundation.

board_of_directors.name: Gordon Riske
board_of_directors.background: Gordon Riske is a Director and former CEO of KION Group AG.
